data.title: Heritage Insurance stock jumps after Piper upgrades to Overweight
data.description:
Heritage Insurance Holdings (NYSE:HRTG) shares accelerated 17% in Friday morning trading after Piper Sandler upgraded the property and casualty insurer to Overweight from Neutral just days after Heritage posted stronger-than-expected Q2 earnings and revenue.

"We see its renewed efforts to grow as a sign that HRTG has turned the corner fully to rate adequacy and the home insurance market is ready for earnings growth," analyst Paul Newsome wrote in a note.

Following multiple years of price increases and and more recent moderating claims inflation, Heritage (HRTG) "now appears to be solidly profitable," he added.

His Outperform rate aligns with the SA Quant system rating of Strong Buy and the average Wall Street analyst rating of Buy.
